statement: Cap set problem (the FunSearch benchmark domain): a cap set in F_3^n is a subset of vectors from {0,1,2}^n containing no three distinct vectors x, y, z with x + y + z = 0 (mod 3) componentwise (equivalently: no three collinear points; note x+y+z=0 includes the case of three equal vectors, which distinctness excludes). Given dimension `n`, return as large a cap set as you can as a list of tuples. You have up to 30 seconds of compute; greedy, local search, or clever constructions all allowed.
